name: iris-sites
description: Isolated Iris site runtime for the web

scripts.build:deps: pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @hashtree/core build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @hashtree/index build && pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @hashtree/nostr build
scripts.test:portable: pnpm run build && pnpm exec vitest run tests/siteConfig.test.ts tests/siteHost.test.ts tests/runtimeUi.test.ts tests/runtimeUpdatePolicy.test.ts tests/faviconSync.test.ts tests/launchInput.test.ts tests/bootShellMarkup.test.ts tests/runtimeMenuMarkup.test.ts tests/swUpdatePolicy.test.ts tests/portableBuildConfig.test.ts tests/releaseSite.test.ts && pnpm exec svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json && node ./scripts/portable-smoke.mjs
